title: Budtender
description:
Join our team as a Budtender at Greenleaf Dispensary in Minneapolis. You'll be the face of our store — guiding customers through product selections, ensuring compliance with MN OCM regulations, and delivering an exceptional experience every visit.

Responsibilities:
- Greet and assist customers with product education and recommendations
- Maintain accurate inventory and cash handling
- Ensure compliance with all Minnesota cannabis regulations
- Operate POS and METRC-integrated systems

Requirements:
- 21+ years old
- MN Cannabis Agent Registration (or ability to obtain)
- Strong customer service background
- Cannabis knowledge preferred

title: Dispensary Manager
description:
NorthStar Cannabis Co. is seeking an experienced Dispensary Manager to oversee day-to-day operations at our St. Paul location. You'll lead a team of 8–12 staff, manage compliance, and drive customer experience.

Responsibilities:
- Manage and schedule retail staff
- Ensure full OCM regulatory compliance
- Oversee METRC inventory tracking
- Drive sales targets and customer satisfaction metrics
- Handle vendor relationships and product ordering

Requirements:
- 3+ years retail management experience
- Cannabis industry experience strongly preferred
- Familiarity with METRC and Minnesota OCM regulations
- Strong leadership and communication skills

title: Cultivation Technician
description:
Prairie Roots Grow Co. is expanding our cultivation team in Mankato. As a Cultivation Technician, you'll support all phases of plant growth from propagation to harvest in our state-of-the-art indoor facility.

Responsibilities:
- Monitor and maintain plant health across all growth stages
- Execute feeding, watering, and IPM schedules
- Maintain detailed records in METRC
- Assist with harvest and post-harvest processing

Requirements:
- Horticulture or agriculture background preferred
- Physical ability to lift 50 lbs and stand for extended periods
- Detail-oriented with strong record-keeping skills
- MN Cannabis Agent Registration required

title: Compliance Officer
description:
Twin Cities Cannabis Group is hiring a Compliance Officer to manage regulatory adherence across our two retail locations and one cultivation site. This is a critical role as MN's regulatory framework continues to evolve.

Responsibilities:
- Monitor and implement OCM regulatory updates
- Manage METRC compliance across all facilities
- Conduct internal audits and staff compliance training
- Liaise with state and local regulators
- Maintain licensing documentation

Requirements:
- Background in compliance, law, or regulated industries
- Strong knowledge of Minnesota cannabis regulations
- METRC experience preferred
- Exceptional organizational and written communication skills

title: Extraction Technician
description:
Northland Extracts is seeking an Extraction Technician to operate and maintain our hydrocarbon and ethanol extraction systems in Duluth. You'll produce concentrates and distillates for wholesale distribution.

Responsibilities:
- Operate BHO and ethanol extraction equipment safely
- Maintain detailed production logs in METRC
- Ensure product quality through testing coordination
- Perform equipment maintenance and cleaning

Requirements:
- Experience in cannabis extraction or chemical processing
- Knowledge of lab safety protocols
- Ability to obtain MN Cannabis Agent Registration
- Mechanical aptitude and attention to detail

title: Budtender
description:
Lake Country Cannabis is looking for a passionate part-time Budtender to join our growing team in Brainerd. Ideal for someone with a flexible schedule who wants to be part of Minnesota's cannabis community.

Responsibilities:
- Assist customers with product selection
- Process transactions accurately
- Maintain store cleanliness and organization
- Stay current on new products and MN regulations

Requirements:
- 21+ years old
- Customer service experience preferred
- Outgoing, friendly personality
- Ability to work weekends

title: Master Grower
description:
Arrowhead Cultivations is seeking an experienced Master Grower to lead our 20,000 sq ft indoor cultivation operation in Hibbing. You'll own the grow from genetics selection through harvest.

Responsibilities:
- Develop and execute cultivation strategies and SOPs
- Manage a team of 4–6 cultivation technicians
- Optimize yield, potency, and plant health
- Oversee METRC plant tracking
- Coordinate with lab for testing and quality assurance

Requirements:
- 5+ years commercial cannabis cultivation experience
- Proven track record with indoor, high-volume operations
- Deep knowledge of plant science, IPM, and nutrient programs
- Strong leadership and team management skills

title: Delivery Driver
description:
Green Route Logistics is hiring cannabis delivery drivers to service dispensaries across the Twin Cities metro. Clean driving record required. Company vehicle provided.

Responsibilities:
- Deliver cannabis products between licensed facilities
- Maintain chain of custody documentation
- Complete METRC transfer manifests accurately
- Follow all MN transport regulations

Requirements:
- Valid MN driver's license with clean record (3 years)
- 21+ years old
- MN Cannabis Agent Registration
- Punctual and reliable

title: Social Media & Marketing Coordinator
description:
Blaze & Bloom is looking for a creative Marketing Coordinator who understands the unique restrictions and opportunities of cannabis marketing in Minnesota.

Responsibilities:
- Manage compliant social media presence across platforms
- Create email campaigns and promotional materials
- Coordinate community events and sponsorships
- Track and report on marketing metrics

Requirements:
- 2+ years marketing experience
- Understanding of cannabis advertising regulations
- Strong graphic design and copywriting skills
- Experience with email marketing platforms

title: Inventory Specialist
description:
NorthStar Cannabis Co. needs a detail-oriented Inventory Specialist for our Eagan location. You'll be the backbone of our compliance and product management systems.

Responsibilities:
- Manage daily METRC inventory reconciliation
- Receive and process product deliveries
- Conduct cycle counts and investigate discrepancies
- Coordinate with procurement on reorder levels

Requirements:
- METRC experience strongly preferred
- Strong math and data entry skills
- Previous inventory management experience
- Ability to obtain MN Cannabis Agent Registration

title: HR Generalist
description:
Twin Cities Cannabis Group is growing fast and needs an HR Generalist to support hiring, onboarding, and people operations across our locations.

Responsibilities:
- Manage full-cycle recruiting for retail and operations roles
- Coordinate MN Cannabis Agent Registration onboarding
- Administer benefits and employee relations
- Maintain HR records in compliance with state regulations

Requirements:
- 2+ years HR generalist experience
- Experience in regulated industries preferred
- Strong knowledge of MN employment law
- SHRM certification a plus

title: Packaging Specialist
description:
Prairie Roots is expanding our post-harvest team and seeking Packaging Specialists to prepare flower and pre-rolls for retail distribution.

Responsibilities:
- Package flower, pre-rolls, and other products to MN label compliance standards
- Operate automated packaging equipment
- Maintain accurate METRC package records
- Meet daily production targets

Requirements:
- Ability to perform repetitive tasks with precision
- Detail-oriented with strong attention to compliance labels
- Previous manufacturing or packaging experience preferred
- Must obtain MN Cannabis Agent Registration

title: Retail Associate (Budtender)
description:
Boundary Waters Cannabis serves locals and tourists exploring the BWCA region. We're seeking a friendly, knowledgeable Retail Associate who loves the outdoors and the plant.

Responsibilities:
- Provide exceptional customer service and product education
- Process sales and maintain register accuracy
- Keep the showroom stocked and clean
- Build relationships with repeat customers

Requirements:
- 21+ years old
- Passion for cannabis and the outdoors
- Customer service experience
- Ability to obtain MN Cannabis Agent Registration

title: Operations Manager
description:
Greenleaf Dispensary is hiring an Operations Manager to streamline processes across our retail and fulfillment operations in Minneapolis.

Responsibilities:
- Oversee daily operational workflows across departments
- Manage vendor relationships and supply chain
- Lead process improvement initiatives
- Support compliance and HR functions

Requirements:
- 3+ years operations management experience
- Cannabis or retail experience preferred
- Strong analytical and project management skills
- Proficiency with inventory and POS systems

title: Trimmer
description:
Arrowhead Cultivations is seeking seasonal Trimmers to support our harvest cycles. Great entry-level opportunity to break into the cannabis industry in northern Minnesota.

Responsibilities:
- Hand-trim harvested flower to quality standards
- Maintain a clean and organized workspace
- Log work in METRC as required
- Follow all facility safety and sanitation protocols

Requirements:
- 21+ years old
- Ability to perform repetitive hand motions for extended periods
- Reliable and punctual
- MN Cannabis Agent Registration required

title: Budtender
description:
Stone Arch Cannabis — located near the iconic Stone Arch Bridge — is seeking passionate Budtenders to join our flagship Minneapolis location.

Responsibilities:
- Educate customers on product categories, effects, and safe use
- Maintain compliance with all MN regulations
- Contribute to a welcoming, inclusive store culture
- Handle POS transactions and opening/closing procedures

Requirements:
- 21+ years old
- Previous cannabis or specialty retail experience preferred
- Strong communication and interpersonal skills
- MN Cannabis Agent Registration (or ability to obtain)

title: Lab Technician
description:
Northland Extracts is looking for a Lab Technician to support quality testing and product development at our Duluth processing facility.

Responsibilities:
- Perform in-house potency and contaminant screening
- Coordinate with third-party testing labs for COA management
- Maintain lab equipment and safety protocols
- Document results in METRC and internal systems

Requirements:
- Associate's or Bachelor's degree in chemistry, biology, or related field
- Lab experience required; cannabis lab experience a plus
- Familiarity with HPLC or GC equipment preferred

title: Dispensary Associate
description:
Lake Country Cannabis is opening a second location in Baxter and needs Part-Time Dispensary Associates for evenings and weekends.

Responsibilities:
- Assist customers with purchases and product questions
- Stock and organize display cases
- Process transactions and verify ID
- Maintain compliance with MN cannabis retail rules

Requirements:
- 21+ years old
- Availability evenings and weekends
- Friendly, professional demeanor
- MN Cannabis Agent Registration required

title: General Manager
description:
Blaze & Bloom is seeking a General Manager to lead our Rochester flagship location. You'll have full P&L responsibility and build the team from the ground up.

Responsibilities:
- Drive revenue, customer experience, and team culture
- Manage full operational and regulatory compliance
- Recruit, train, and develop a team of 15–20
- Own the location's P&L and reporting to ownership

Requirements:
- 5+ years general management in retail or hospitality
- Cannabis experience strongly preferred
- Proven track record of building high-performing teams
- Deep familiarity with MN OCM regulations

title: Brand Ambassador
description:
Prairie Roots Grow Co. is seeking Brand Ambassadors to represent our craft cannabis brand at dispensary events, pop-ups, and industry functions across the Twin Cities.

Responsibilities:
- Represent Prairie Roots at retail and industry events
- Educate retail staff and consumers on our product line
- Collect and report market intelligence
- Maintain professional brand standards

Requirements:
- Outgoing personality with strong public speaking skills
- Cannabis product knowledge preferred
- Reliable transportation across the metro
- 21+ and MN Cannabis Agent Registration
